data.body:
I will have a proper #nsfw customs list once I actually know what #mecfs fully affects. 
Now:
Ring lights: headache after a bit of exposure
Solo-play: pleasure ☞ PEM
Head sensitivity: headache after 30 mins on my head
Reading: headache often, frequent breaks
Speaking: headache often, frequent breaks

data.body:
Feature creep for the win (Added jumping on other units head for pathing)

For a proper development, I used the Manhattan distance code given in the documentation for A* & removed the Y-axis as a variable in cost calculation as it would mess up the movement range & path taken. 
#Godot

data.body:
Yes. "Vertriebene" = Refugees = 12 million German people and their descendants. I encountered many Germans in their 70's who had grown up in refugee camps during the crisis.
ofc that background counted. And I got to hear lots of sour comments about how unwelcoming Germans had been in the late 1940s.

data.body:
My ability to recognize faces never got past muppets. Someone has to be as visually distinct as a muppet for my brain to be able to recognize them. 

My partner, on the other hand, regularly tells me that she knows the cats in the random cat videos I show her. She recognizes them on sight. The cats!

data.body:
I've made it 5 times using Bob's Red Mill organic dark rye flour, and I've never been disappointed.  

My favorite Rugbrauð story.  It takes around 15 hours to bake in a coffee can submerged in a volcanic spring.  The president of Iceland wanted to offer her a loaf of Rugbrauð, and his staff forgot.
